mapper.insert: INSERT INTO assign (supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, assign_Amount) VALUES (#{supermarketId}, #{commodityId}, #{amount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE assign_Amount = VALUES(assign_Amount)

INSERT INTO assign (supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, assign_Amount) VALUES
(#{item.supermarketId}, #{item.commodityId}, #{item.assignAmount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE assign_Amount = VALUES(assign_Amount)
mapper.select: SELECT supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, assign_Amount FROM assign
SELECT supermarket_Id, commodity_Id, assign_Amount FROM assign WHERE commodity_Id = #{commodityId}
